title: urtica microphylla
intro: Urtica microphylla, also known as dwarf nettle, is a perennial plant species in the nettle family that is native to the Andean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce pain. The plant is rich in vitamins and minerals, offering various health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Urtica microphylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
